author: doll-agent
content: Verified done. benchmarks/statistical_equivalence.py runs 47 test cases across ufunc (17 fns × 2 sizes), stats (3 × 2), linalg (matmul × 3), fft (4 sizes) against NumPy on identical inputs. Each test calls ferray_bench in single-call mode (raw f64/Complex result arrays as JSON over stdin/stdout — see #652), computes ULP distances, runs Welch's t-test or max-ULP threshold fallback. Per-category ULP thresholds account for operation-ordering divergence in reductions/matmul/FFT. Just ran: 47/47 PASS, no regressions.
